Name: Body Shift
Description: The Garou is able to use fine-tuned shapeshifting to change the very nature of their physical body, becoming lither, stronger, or more dense at will, without changing form completely. The Gift is granted by a water-spirit.
System: The player tests Stamina + Glory at a Difficulty of 2. Each success in the margin allows them to redistribute a single dot from one Physical Attribute to another. No Attribute can drop below 0 or exceed 5 dots through use of this Gift. At the Storyteller’s discretion, this Gift can also allow the user to contort their body to fit into spaces too tight for a normal body to traverse, such as common air ducts or water pipes. In this case, the Difficulty is based on the dimensions of the target space.
